Hospital payment policies had greater impact on U.S. female sterilization rates than 1970s consent reforms

🤖 IA: It's clickbait ⚠️
👥 Users: It's clickbait ⚠️

#sterilization #healthpolicy #reproductiverights 

View full AI summary:

external.description:
A new study by a health economist and a political scientist examines long-term shifts in female sterilization trends in the United States and the policy forces that shaped them. The researchers compared two major historical inflection points: the 1970s reforms following the Relf v. Weinberger case, which exposed coercive and non-consensual sterilizations tied to welfare and federal programs, and the 1990s changes in hospital payment systems that reduced postpartum hospital stays.

The Relf case led to stronger consent requirements, including waiting periods and minimum age rules for federally funded sterilizations. While these reforms slowed the growth of sterilization rates, they did not reverse the overall trend. Sterilization continued to rise through the late 20th century, increasing from about 5% of women in 1970 to roughly 13% in 1975, and reaching nearly one in four married women of reproductive age by 1990. The study also found limited changes in populations historically targeted for coercion, including young Black women in the South.

In contrast, the 1990s shift toward shorter hospital stays after childbirth—driven by insurance payment structures that reimbursed fixed amounts regardless of length of stay—had a stronger effect. Because tubal ligation is often performed immediately after delivery while patients are still hospitalized, shorter stays reduced opportunities for women to undergo the procedure. This administrative change was associated with the first sustained national decline in sterilization rates since the 1960s.

The researchers argue that both overt policy reforms and subtle administrative incentives shape reproductive outcomes, sometimes more strongly than public moral outrage or legal intervention. They also note that sterilization remains both a desired form of contraception and, in some cases, a constrained choice shaped by healthcare access, insurance rules, and institutional limits. Following the 2022 Dobbs decision, interest in permanent contraception has risen again, highlighting ongoing tensions between access, autonomy, and system-driven constraints in reproductive healthcare.
external.title: Hospital payment policies had greater impact on U.S. female sterilization rates than 1970s consent reforms

1944 Volkswagen Type 82 Kübelwagen: Design and Role of Germany’s WWII Utility Vehicle

🤖 IA: It's not clickbait ✅
👥 Users: It's not clickbait ✅

#volkswagen #ww2 #militaryvehicle 

View full AI summary:

external.description:
The 1944 Volkswagen Type 82 Kübelwagen was a key light utility vehicle used by German forces during World War II. Designed by Ferdinand Porsche, it was developed from the early Volkswagen Beetle platform but adapted specifically for military use. Unlike many other wartime vehicles, the Kübelwagen did not rely on four-wheel drive. Instead, its performance off-road came from a combination of very low weight, a rear-mounted air-cooled engine, and a self-locking differential system that improved traction on uneven terrain.

By 1944, the design had been refined through years of battlefield use. The vehicle featured simplified construction to improve reliability and ease of mass production during wartime shortages. Its corrugated metal body panels added structural strength without significantly increasing weight, making it more durable in harsh conditions. The air-cooled engine was particularly important, as it allowed the vehicle to operate in extreme climates ranging from the deserts of North Africa to the freezing conditions of the Eastern Front in Russia.

The Kübelwagen became widely recognized for its practicality and mechanical simplicity, which often allowed it to outperform heavier and more complex Allied vehicles in difficult terrain. Its versatility made it essential for troop transport, reconnaissance, and general logistical support.

Beyond its wartime role, the Kübelwagen influenced post-war vehicle design, including civilian models such as the Volkswagen Type 181, commonly known as the VW Thing. Although it was created for military purposes, its engineering approach emphasized durability, efficiency, and simplicity—principles that later shaped Volkswagen’s post-war identity and continued development of the Beetle platform.
external.title: 1944 Volkswagen Type 82 Kübelwagen: Design and Role of Germany’s WWII Utility Vehicle

This era embodied the American Dream for many, with families settling into newly built suburban homes featuring modern appliances, green lawns, and community-oriented lifestyles. The nuclear family model became prominent, often depicted with a station wagon in the driveway and children playing safely in neighborhoods. Social life revolved around backyard barbecues, holiday celebrations, birthday parties, and quiet moments at home. These images from the David Wipf collection provide an authentic window into daily routines and family dynamics of the time. They showcase parents engaging with children, families gathering for meals, and the simplicity of mid-century domestic life. The photographs highlight the optimism and stability that defined postwar America, where consumerism boomed and homeownership surged. While romanticized in popular culture, the 1950s also reflected broader societal shifts including technological advancements in household goods and the growth of the middle class. This collection serves as a valuable historical record, preserving candid scenes that illustrate both the joys and conventional structures of family existence during that decade. The visuals capture everything from leisure activities to everyday household interactions, offering viewers a nostalgic yet realistic perspective on how Americans built their lives in the years following global conflict.

まあ、なんというか、そんな感じで一応意味はあるのですが、音楽とセットで聴くものという風にとらえていただいて、、、なんとなーくノリで聴いていただいても全然ＯＫですよ！

ああ……^^;
『境界のメビウス』と『Unnamed Star』は走っている世界が違います。

『境界のメビウス』の世界は一番最初に「時計のない車内で～」と言っているように、時間の流れがありません。過去も未来もない「夢」に似た異世界です。なので、意識的に「次の一歩を踏み出す」までグルグル回り続けます。

一方、『Unnamed Star』は、現実世界です。未来方向へ一方通行の時間の流れがあります。意識してもしていなくてもじゃんじゃん過ぎ去っていき、物事をダイナミックに変えてしまいます。

images.alt: Horizontales Balkendiagramm: Industrieller Output der 27 EU-Länder im Jahr 2024 in Milliarden Euro, sortiert nach absoluter Größe. Deutschland führt mit großem Abstand bei 1013 Milliarden Euro, gefolgt von Italien mit 418 und Frankreich mit 400 Milliarden Euro. Spanien folgt mit 249, Polen mit 194 und Irland mit 184 Milliarden Euro. Im Mittelfeld liegen die Niederlande mit 159, Österreich mit 104, Schweden mit 101, sowie Belgien und Dänemark mit jeweils 88 Milliarden Euro. Tschechien erreicht 85, Rumänien 68, Finnland 56, Portugal 47 und Ungarn 45 Milliarden Euro. Es folgen Griechenland mit 37, die Slowakei mit 30, Bulgarien mit 22, Slowenien mit 18 sowie Kroatien und Litauen mit jeweils 14 Milliarden Euro. Die kleinsten Industrieoutputs verzeichnen Estland mit 7, Lettland mit 6, Luxemburg mit 5 sowie Zypern und Malta mit jeweils rund 2 Milliarden Euro. Datenbasis: nominales BIP 2024 multipliziert mit dem Anteil des Produzierenden Gewerbes. Quelle: Destatis und Eurostat.

After conservationists reintroduced a family of beavers into a nearby city park, the animals built dams and restored wetlands that now absorb and slow floodwater naturally.

record.text: The funniest part of this is that no one seemed to realise how unlike Kara Swisher the Kara Swisher quote sounded. From the linked NYT article:

images.alt:
Mr. Rosenbaum's book contains many quotes that are accurate, but the misattributed and invented quotes are scattered throughout.

One of the quotes is attributed to Kara Swisher, a prominent technology journalist, in a chapter about A.I. lies. "The most sophisticated A.I. language model is like a mirror," the book says Ms. Swisher wrote. "It reflects our own morality back at us, polished and articulate, but ultimately empty behind the surface. It's not bound by Asimov's laws or any ethical framework — it's bound by the patterns in its training data and the objectives set by its creators."
When asked about the quote, Ms. Swisher said in a text message that she "never said that," adding that it seems the quote was made up by A.I. and not Mr. Rosenbaum.
"I also sound like I have a stick up my butt, according to ChatGPT," Ms. Swisher said.

images.alt:
Der Manga »World's End Harem: Fantasia (Shūmatsu no Harem Fantasia)« von LINK & SAVAN ist am 26. April 2026 auf der Webplattform »Shounen Jump+« von Shueisha zu Ende gegangen. Die Reihe startete in Japan am 19. April 2018 auf »Shounen Jump+« und umfasst bislang 16 Bände. Seven Seas Entertainment veröffentlicht das Werk auf Englisch, während hierzulande bisher das Werk nicht auf Deutsch erhältlich ist.

📜 Beschreibung 》
Das Königreich Nargala steht am Rand des Untergangs. Dunkelheit und Verfall haben die Welt erfasst, während Kronerbe Arc noch immer nach einer Macht sucht, mit der er sein Schicksal wenden kann. Als die geheimnisvolle Dunkelelfe Lati vor ihm erscheint, bietet sie ihm genau diese Kraft an. Doch ihr Angebot führt ihn auf einen gefährlichen Weg, auf dem Begierde, Macht und der drohende Zusammenbruch der Welt untrennbar miteinander verbunden sind.

Mit einem Teaser gab der japanische  Verlag Kadokawa bekannt, dass der Manga »The Eccentric Doctor of the Moon Flower Kingdom (Gekkakoku Kīden)« von Tōru Himuka eine Anime-Adaption erhält. 
Dieser entsteht demnach bei Studio Elle unter der Regie von Kōichirō Kuroda. Die Serieskomposition übernimmt Aki Mizuki (Risa Mizuno), während das Charakterdesign von Akira Ono stammt. Die Soundregie liegt bei Hozumi Gōda und die Musik komponiert Shiho Terada, während HIGHWAY STAR für die Musikproduktion verantwortlich ist. Weitere Informationen zum Starttermin sind bislang nicht bekannt.

In Japan erscheint die Reihe seit Januar 2018 im »Asuka«-Magazin von Kadokawa und umfasst mit dem heute veröffentlichten neuesten Band bislang 15 Bände. Seven Seas Entertainment veröffentlicht das Werk auf Englisch (13. Bände), während Altraverse die Reihe hierzulande unter »Koyo: Die exzentrische Ärztin des Mondblumenreiches« auf Deutsch verlegt (9. Bände).

📜 Beschreibung 》
Im Reich der Mondblume gilt die heilende Badekunst als bewährtes Mittel gegen Krankheiten und Verletzungen. Doch als Kronprinz Keiun während einer Inspektionsreise Zeuge wird, wie die junge Ärztin Koyō eine erstaunliche Wundnaht durchführt, gerät sein Blick auf die Medizin des Landes ins Wanken. Zwischen alten Überzeugungen, politischen Intrigen und tief verwurzelten Traditionen stellen sich die beiden den Problemen ihres Reiches.

Markdown es el verdadero lenguaje de los LLMs
Disculpa ninguna, todo bien :)

Quick map of solo story writer tools (2026):

Obsidian — local notes + graph view
Sudowrite — AI copilot, voice-matched scenes
Scrivener — long-form manuscript classic
Plottr — visual planner, timelines & arcs

Your go-to? Why?

#Writing #WritingTools

Quick map of worldbuilding tools (2026):

World Anvil — wiki + timelines + relations
Campfire — character/plot modules
Inkarnate — fantasy maps in browser
Azgaar's FMG — procedural map, free

Your go-to? Why?

#Worldbuilding #Writing

Engineers handle hundreds of thousands of lines with text and shortcuts, not fancy GUIs. Text is the one medium that fits in your head completely.

Writers building vast worlds need the same. The fancier the tool, the more your story takes the shape of the tool.
